description.en: Farm Tablet v2 — Complete overhaul. Central tablet interface for farm management with sidebar navigation, rich data visualisation and modular app system.
description.de: Farm Tablet v2 – Komplette Überarbeitung. Zentrale Tablet-Oberfläche mit Sidebar-Navigation, reichhaltiger Datenvisualisierung und modularem App-System.
description.fr: Farm Tablet v2 — Refonte complète. Interface tablette centrale avec navigation latérale, visualisation de données avancée et système d'applications modulaire.

helpLine.en: Press T (configurable) to open/close the Farm Tablet. All apps are accessible from the sidebar icon panel on the left.
helpLine.de: Drücke T (einstellbar), um das Farm-Tablet zu öffnen/schließen. Alle Apps sind über die Seitenleiste links erreichbar.

helpLine.en: Dashboard: Farm balance hero card, finance summary, field and vehicle counts, season/time and live weather snapshot.
Workshop: Walk within 25m of any vehicle to inspect fuel, wear and operating hours. Click SELECT to pin a vehicle for detailed diagnostics.
Field Manager: All owned fields with crop type, growth phase badges and color-coded state indicators.
Animals: Per-pen food, water and cleanliness progress bars with traffic-light color coding.
Bucket Tracker: Automatically detects and counts loader/excavator dumps. Shows load history with material type and estimated weight.
App Store: Browse all installed apps. Companion mod apps (Income, Tax, NPC Favor, Crop Stress, Soil Fertilizer) appear automatically when those mods are loaded.
Type tablet in the developer console for a list of all available console commands.

text.name: ft_enabled_long
text.en: Enable or disable the farm tablet system

text.name: ft_keybind_long
text.en: Key to open/close the farm tablet

text.name: ft_notifications_long
text.en: Show tablet notifications on game load

text.name: ft_startupapp_long
text.en: Default app when opening the tablet

text.name: ft_soundeffects_long
text.en: Play sound effects for tablet interactions
